text: H4 log returns: mean=0.000148, std=0.0148, skew=-0.201, excess_kurt=20.41
Jarque-Bera rejects normality: stat=325731.1, p=0.00e+00. Excess kurtosis 20.4 indicates heavy tails.
ACF(returns): 25/100 lags significant at 5%. Lag1=-0.0441. Max |ACF|=0.0740. Weak serial dependence in raw returns.
ACF(|returns|): 100/100 lags significant. Lag1=0.2607, lag50=0.1326, lag100=0.1117. Strong volatility clustering — slow decay.
PACF(returns): significant lags = [1, 3, 4, 6, 7, 9, 10, 11, 16, 19]. Lag1=-0.0441. Little structure beyond lag 1-2.
Variance ratio: 3/9 periods VR>1, 0/9 significant at 5%. VR(20)=0.9499, VR(120)=1.0651. Mostly consistent with random walk.
Hurst (R/S): full sample H=0.583. Rolling (500-bar): mean=0.588, range [0.50, 0.70]. H>0.5 suggests mild persistence.
Uptrends ≥10%: 175 events, mean duration=53 bars (211h), mean magnitude=21.5%.
Uptrends ≥20%: 61 events, mean duration=150 bars (599h), mean magnitude=45.2%.
Volatility ACF: 100/100 lags significant. Lag1=0.986, lag50=0.468. Extremely persistent — characteristic of long-memory vol.
Vol-return correlation: contemporaneous r=0.0092 (p=0.207). Lagged vol→ret: lag1 r=0.0128, lag20 r=0.0041. Weak vol→return predictability.
Vol regimes — Low (<39%): mean ret 1.69 bps, High (>62%): mean ret -0.04 bps.
H4 volume: mean=10281 BTC, heavily right-skewed (skew=4.60). Taker buy ratio: mean=0.4950, std=0.0481 — centered near 0.50 with low dispersion.
Volume × |return| (contemp): r=0.3323 — volume concurrent with large moves. Leading volume→return: |r| < 0.03 at all horizons. Taker buy ratio→return: similarly negligible.
D1 regime differentials: SMA(200) diff=202.8 pp/yr (p=0.0000), EMA(21) diff=661.2 pp/yr (p=0.0000), EMA(50) diff=428.7 pp/yr (p=0.0000).
H4 returns conditioned on D1 regime (1-day lag): EMA(21) above=3.67 bps, below=-0.93 bps (Welch p=0.0356). Cross-timeframe regime conditioning has significant effect on H4 mean returns.
